issues.description: RevealFromHand is incorrect. Card text says 'Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck' — this is RevealFromDeck, not RevealFromHand
Missing filter for 'other than [Sanji]'. The PlayFromHand action must exclude Sanji cards via filter
Missing action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck. DSL must include a placement mechanic for unrevealed cards
PlayFromHand is semantically incorrect when card is revealed from deck. Should be PlaySelf or equivalent deck-reveal-play mechanism
